grades.expectation: Response mentions checking competentperson.co.uk to verify if installer was registered
grades.reason: Response suggests checking if installer was registered but doesn't mention the specific competentperson.co.uk website

grades.expectation: Response mentions FENSA specifically as the relevant competent person scheme for windows
grades.reason: FENSA is clearly mentioned as the relevant certification scheme for windows

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes between self-certification (competent person) and local authority routes
grades.reason: Clearly distinguishes between FENSA certification and local authority building control approval as two different routes

grades.expectation: Response warns about the 'no approach' rule before pursuing indemnity insurance
grades.reason: Mentions indemnity insurance as an option but doesn't warn about the 'no approach' rule requirement

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part L (energy efficiency/insulation) as relevant regulation for windows
grades.reason: Specifically mentions Part L (energy efficiency) requirements in the context of window replacements
